caption: A screen recording shows a browser window open to a digital mapping tool, likely Kumu, displaying a network diagram on a dark background. In the upper right corner, a small webcam overlay shows a man wearing a dark t-shirt and headphones. The main screen features several circular nodes connected by blue lines. One prominent rectangular node contains a black-and-white illustration of a person standing in a landscape, with the accompanying text "SLIB EFVMI-NG" and a longer description starting with "NFE 150 DEBUG jam!". Other nodes are labeled with green text, including "Rural Blocking". The browser's tab bar lists multiple open pages, including "That & Learning by Synterneti", "Elements by Synterneti", "Future of Society by Synterneti", and "Insights > Introduction | Kumu". Across the sequence, the man in the webcam remains still, and the digital map remains static with no movements or changes to the displayed content.
